overall.description: Third-person exploration gameplay from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing the Sanctuary of Delphi. The player approaches the Shimmering Treasury entrance, enters a sunlit courtyard, and observes a monumental wall of golden warrior statues with worshippers praying at the base.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered portico entrance of ancient treasury

events.description: camera approaches the large ornate bronze door of the treasury
the heavy bronze door begins to open inward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily between massive fluted columns toward the ornate treasury entrance

entered.detail: massive cylindrical column with vertical fluting and decorative bands
matching column on right side of entrance
large double door with bronze ring handles and decorative studs
large painted ceramic vase with intricate patterns
wide stone steps leading up to the doorway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at the entrance to the Sanctuary of Delphi's treasury, with the camera moving between massive fluted stone columns toward an ornate bronze door. The door begins to open as the camera approaches, revealing the interior courtyard beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sanctuary courtyard with ceremonial monuments

events.description: passing through the treasury doorway into the sunlit interior courtyard
emerging from shadow of portico into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: passing through the doorway threshold into the open courtyard, moving toward the central monument area

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing motionless near a glowing marker in the courtyard

entered.detail: large stone statue of a robed figure on a raised pedestal
tree with orange and yellow leaves indicating autumn
decorated stone platform with offerings and garlands
steep rocky cliff face forming the sanctuary's background

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the doorway into a bright sunlit courtyard. A large robed statue stands on a pedestal ahead, with autumn trees to the left and a ceremonial altar to the right. The rocky mountain face rises in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: processional way approaching the golden warrior monument

events.description: approaching the wall of golden statues, location text changes to Sanctuary of Epiphanes
camera begins to pan right along the curved wall of statues

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone path toward the monumental golden statues, observing the sanctuary grounds

notable_agents.action: group of three robed figures standing before the golden statues in prayer

entered.detail: row of life-sized golden warrior statues with spears and shields mounted on stone wall
curved stone wall supporting the golden statues
vertical beam of purple light marking a point of interest

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the courtyard toward a monumental curved wall adorned with golden warrior statues. The location becomes the Sanctuary of Epiphanes. Three robed figures stand in prayer at the base of the statues as the camera approaches and begins to pan along the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial monument base with golden warrior statues

events.description: camera slows and focuses on the NPCs praying at the statue base
camera completes pan across the full row of seven golden hoplite statues

agents.ego_description: slowly panning along the monument base, closely observing the golden statues and worshippers

notable_agents.action: three robed worshippers standing with arms raised in prayer before the statues

entered.detail: red and pink flower petals scattered across the stone pavement
mature tree with green foliage behind the statue wall

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly pans along the base of the monument, revealing seven golden hoplite statues in detail. Three worshippers stand praying among scattered flower petals. An olive tree frames the scene from the right as the camera completes its observation of the sanctuary.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed entrance of a treasury into a brilliant, open-air sanctuary filled with golden monuments. It begins by gliding between massive fluted stone columns toward an ornate bronze door, which swings open to reveal a bright, sunlit courtyard. As the camera passes through the threshold, the scene expands to show a robed statue on a pedestal flanked by autumn trees and a ceremonial altar against a backdrop of rocky mountains. The movement then carries forward into the Sanctuary of Epiphanes, shifting toward a monumental curved wall adorned with golden warrior statues where robed figures stand in prayer. Finally, the camera pans slowly along the base of the monument to reveal seven detailed golden hoplites and scattered flower petals, with an olive tree framing the view as the observation concludes.
